steps.title: Add a WHY header to {name}
steps.description: Top-of-file comment block (6-14 lines) for {path}: WHAT it does in one plain sentence, WHY it exists (which real problem/pillar), HOW it fits (inputs, outputs, who calls it), and one copy-paste usage line. Written for a curious newcomer: no acronym without a docs/GLOSSARY.md link, no insider references. Keep the existing first-line shebang/imports untouched.
acceptance_criteria: a newcomer can state the file's purpose after reading only the header

steps.title: Add a runnable example for {name} to the commands reference
steps.description: Ensure docs/COMMANDS.md has an entry for {name} (CLI tools) or an @example doc-comment (lib files): 1-2 line description + one copy-paste command with expected-output snippet, verified against the fixture portfolio where applicable.
acceptance_criteria: entry/example exists and the command actually runs
